name: CinemaKoin
description: CinemaKoin will be a decentralized, open-source blockchain with smart contract functionality. CinemaKoin will be the native cryptocurrency of the Cinemachain platform. The CinemaChain Virtual Machine will be the software platform that developers can use to create decentralized applications (DApps) on CinemaChain. This virtual machine is where all CinemaChain accounts and smart contracts live.
